articles.title: Anthropic 正考虑向公众开放Claude Mythos ，Opus 4.8 即将登场

articles.excerpt: Tokenisation is an integral part of the current NLP pipeline. Current tokenisation algorithms such as BPE and Unigram are greedy algorithms -- they make locally optimal decisions without considering the resulting vocabulary as a whole. We instead formulate tokeniser construction as a linear program and solve it using convex optimisation tools, yielding a new algorithm we call ConvexTok. We find Co
articles.summary: 针对BPE和Unigram等贪心分词算法的局限性，将分词构造形式化为线性规划并用凸优化求解，提出全局优化算法ConvexTok。该方法有望提升分词质量及下游任务效果。

articles.title: Cambrian-P: Pose-Grounded Video Understanding
articles.excerpt: Camera pose matters. The position and orientation of each viewpoint define a shared spatial coordinate frame that relates observations across video frames. Yet this signal is largely absent from multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) for video understanding, which process frames as isolated 2D snapshots, instead of the persistent scene humans perceive. We revisit pose as a lightweight supervisory signal and intr
articles.summary: 现有视频理解MLLM将帧视为孤立2D快照，忽略相机姿态提供的共享空间帧。Cambrian-P重新引入姿态作为轻量级监督信号，使模型感知持续场景，提升时空理解能力。

articles.title: MotiMotion: Motion-Controlled Video Generation with Visual Reasoning
articles.excerpt: Current motion-controlled image-to-video generation models rigidly follow user-provided trajectories that are often sparse, imprecise, and causally incomplete. Such reliance often yields unnatural or implausible outcomes, especially by missing secondary causal consequences. To address this, we introduce MotiMotion, a novel framework that reformulates motion control as a reasoning-then-generation p
articles.summary: 当前运动控制视频生成模型僵化跟随稀疏、不精确轨迹，忽略因果后果。MotiMotion将运动控制重构为“推理-生成”流程，先用视觉推理补全因果链再生成视频，结果更自然合理。

articles.title: Sensor2Sensor: Cross-Embodiment Sensor Conversion for Autonomous Driving
articles.excerpt: Robust training and validation of Autonomous Driving Systems (ADS) require massive, diverse datasets. Proprietary data collected by Autonomous Vehicle (AV) fleets, while high-fidelity, are limited in scale, diversity of sensor configurations, as well as geographic and long-tail-behavioral coverage. In contrast, in-the-wild data from sources like dashcams offers immense scale and diversity, capturi
articles.summary: 自动驾驶训练受限于专有数据的规模与多样性。Sensor2Sensor实现跨传感器配置转换，将行车记录仪等野外数据转化为高保真传感器数据，极大扩展训练数据规模与场景覆盖。

articles.title: Gated DeltaNet-2: Decoupling Erase and Write in Linear Attention
articles.excerpt: Linear attention replaces the unbounded cache of softmax attention with a fixed-size recurrent state, reducing sequence mixing to linear time and decoding to constant memory. The hard part is not just what to forget, but how to edit this compressed memory without scrambling existing associations. Delta-rule models subtract the current read before writing a new value, and Kimi Delta Attention (KDA)
articles.summary: 线性注意力面临压缩记忆编辑破坏已有关联的问题。Gated DeltaNet-2解耦擦除与写入操作，在固定大小循环状态下更精确更新记忆，提升长序列建模能力，同时保持线性复杂度。

articles.title: DecQ: Detail-Condensing Queries for Enhanced Reconstruction and Generation in Representation Autoencoders
articles.excerpt: Representation Autoencoders (RAEs) leverage frozen vision foundation models (VFMs) as tokenizer encoders, providing robust high-level representations that facilitate fast convergence and high-quality generation in latent diffusion models. However, freezing the VFM inherently constrains its spatial reconstruction capacity, limiting fine-grained generation and image editing; in contrast, incorporati
articles.summary: 表示自编码器(RAE)利用冻结视觉基础模型(VFM)作为编码器，但冻结限制了空间重建细节。DecQ通过细节凝聚查询增强解码器获取细粒度信息，改善潜在扩散模型的生成与编辑质量。

articles.title: Understanding Data Temporality Impact on Large Language Models Pre-training
articles.excerpt: Large language models (LLMs) are typically trained on shuffled corpora, yielding models whose knowledge is frozen at train time and whose temporal grounding remains poorly understood. In this work, we study the impact of pre-training dynamics on the acquisition of time-sensitive factual knowledge, focusing specifically on data ordering. Our main contributions are twofold. First, we introduce a com
articles.summary: LLM通常在打乱语料上训练，导致时间感知能力不足。该研究系统分析预训练数据排序对时间敏感事实知识获取的影响，并提出评估框架，为数据时序组织提供指导。

articles.title: Diversed Model Discovery via Structured Table Discovery
articles.excerpt: Model cards describe model behavior through a mixture of textual descriptions and structured artifacts, including performance, configuration, and dataset tables. Existing model search systems rely predominantly on semantic similarity over text, which can produce homogeneous result sets and limit exploration of alternatives. We argue that model search is inherently comparative: users want models th
articles.summary: 现有模型搜索依赖文本语义相似度，结果同质化。该工作利用模型卡片中的结构化表格（性能、配置、数据集）进行比较性搜索，提升发现多样性，帮助用户探索替代模型。

articles.title: Uniform Diffusion Models Revisited: Leave-One-Out Denoiser and Absorbing State Reformulation
articles.excerpt: Discrete diffusion models are often trained through clean-data prediction, but the prediction can be used in different ways to define the reverse dynamics. In Masked Diffusion Models (MDM) these choices largely coincide, whereas in Uniform Diffusion Models (UDM) they do not. We show that the standard plug-in bridge parameterization for UDM is not optimized by the denoising posterior, but by a leav
articles.summary: 离散扩散模型UDM的标准桥接参数化并非由降噪后验优化。重新审视后提出留一法降噪器与吸收态重新公式化，修正训练与推理的失配，改善离散扩散生成质量。

articles.title: WorldKV: Efficient World Memory with World Retrieval and Compression
articles.excerpt: Autoregressive video diffusion models have enabled real-time, action-conditioned world generation. However, sustaining a persistent world, where revisiting a previously seen viewpoint yields consistent content, remains an open problem. Full KV-cache attention preserves this consistency but breaks real-time constraints: memory footprint and attention cost grow linearly with rollout length. Sliding
articles.summary: 自回归视频扩散模型需维持世界一致性，但全KV缓存难以实时。WorldKV通过世界检索与压缩实现高效持久世界记忆，在不破坏实时约束前提下保持视角重访时的内容一致性。
